title: Hector Avenue murder-accused denied bail
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Thabang Molefe (23), the man accused of fatally stabbing Athenkosi Gavu (29) in Hector Avenue, KwaNonqaba, on 27 July, was denied bail during his last appearance in the Mossel Bay Magistrate's Court on 29 August.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Thabang Molefe (23), the man accused of fatally stabbing Athenkosi Gavu (29) in Hector Avenue, KwaNonqaba, on 27 July, was denied bail during his last appearance in the Mossel Bay Magistrate's Court on 29 August."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Gavu was stabbed in the neck and back at about 04:40 that morning. He was declared dead on the scene."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Molefe was arrested in connection with the murder on 11 August.","html":"Molefe was arrested in connection with the murder on 11 August."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He is expected to appear in court again on 8 October.","html":"He is expected to appear in court again on 8 October."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous articles:","html":"Previous articles:"},{"type":"list","items":["Two killed in separate stabbing incidents, one arrested","Murder suspect arrested in KwaNonqaba"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
